nodes.label: AI as collaborative colleague for ideas and editing
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or inconsistent tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI like a well informed colleague, so I ask it what it thinks about arguments I might be planning to user, or for ideas about things like design principles.

nodes.label: AI assistance in professional writing and argument refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI failing to anticipate needs or provide appropriate language
nodes.grounding_span: I will put it into AI and ask it for its opinion - comments on writing style, professionalism of language, and spelling and grammar etc.

nodes.label: AI capability in architectural descriptions
nodes.label_negative: AI inconsistency and inaccuracy in architectural descriptions
nodes.grounding_span: I have noticed its not great at architectural descriptions of buildings.

nodes.label: Human enjoyment of research and discovery
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over research and discovery process
nodes.grounding_span: The main thing I enjoy in my job is the research, understanding and learning about a site and its history.

nodes.label: Professional expertise and subjectivity in heritage decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI replacing human judgment in heritage decisions
nodes.grounding_span: there's a degree of subjectivity always in decisions about the built environment and history that I think a human mind might still be better at dealing with

nodes.label: Professional fulfillment and joy in learning
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy research for its own sake - I am interested in history and places

nodes.label: Professional credibility and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: enough value put on my professional qualifications and affiliations

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: I use it like an editor, to review draft reports and help me address spelling and grammar and refine my language.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI like a well informed colleague

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inconsistency in architectural descriptions
nodes.grounding_span: I have noticed its not great at architectural descriptions of buildings.

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future role in research
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI could probably do things for me already that I don't even consider asking it.

nodes.label: Preference for human-led research despite AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI could probably do some of that but I like doing it.

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — drafts then seeks AI feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I will draft a report / chapter and then once its completed ... I will put it into AI and ask it for its opinion

nodes.label: Reflective anticipation of counterarguments
nodes.grounding_span: ask for thoughts on if I can improve my argument anywhere, and how someone arguing back might frame their comments
